creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I'm really not sure what's going on here.. I've just tried to replicate 
your problem and have completely failed to do so.  It's possible that 
the implicit dependency libxml->scrollkeeper->gnomelibs->...->oaf is 
broken in some respect, so I've added an explicit dependency to libxml 
in x11/gnomelibs, which will be picked up by the USE_GNOMELIBS knob 
in devel/oaf/Makefile.
